name: AFLGLOBAL.COM
message: [AI generated] AFLGLOBAL.COM is the digital presence of AFL, a global manufacturer of products and services for the telecom, energy, and industries sectors. Based in Duncan, SC, AFL's offerings include fiber optic cable, transmission, and substation accessories, and it provides network services. Founded in 1984, the company has operations in the U.S., Mexico, Europe, Asia, and Australia.
